response:
• At approximately 3:45 PM on March 15th, a silver 2019 Honda Accord failed to stop at a red light at the intersection of Maple Street and 5th Avenue, striking the driver's side of a blue 2021 Toyota Camry that was proceeding through the intersection on a green light.
• Both vehicles sustained significant front-end and side damage and were towed from the scene; the driver of the Camry was transported to Central Hospital with minor injuries, while the Accord driver declined medical treatment.
• Police officers documented witness statements and issued a traffic citation to the Accord driver for running a red light; both parties exchanged insurance information and the incident has been referred to their respective carriers for claims processing.
